articles.headline: Marriages by the Rev. Peter Williams and the Rev. Benjamin Paul, New York
articles.summary: Marriage notices in New York: by the Rev. Peter Williams, Mr. Alexander Sutcliff to Mrs. Tally Hunt; and by the Rev. Benjamin Paul, Mr. John Jackson to Miss Diana Henderson. Records of the free Black community of New York, with two of its prominent ministers officiating.

articles.headline: Deaths noted in Freedom's Journal, New York (Feb. 1829)
articles.summary: New York death notices: Mr. Abraham Cumming, aged 42; Mrs. Emily Johnson, aged 66; and Miss Fanny (surname OCR-garbled). Recorded in Freedom's Journal's death column.

events.name: Marriages solemnized by the Rev. Peter Williams and the Rev. Benjamin Paul, New York (Feb. 1829)
events.description: Two marriages of the free coloured community of New York: by the Rev. Peter Williams, Alexander Sutcliff to Tally Hunt; and by the Rev. Benjamin Paul, John Jackson to Diana Henderson.

events.name: Deaths noted in Freedom's Journal, New York (Feb. 1829)
events.description: Death notices recorded in Freedom's Journal: Abraham Cumming (aged 42) and Emily Johnson (aged 66). (A third, Miss Fanny, has an OCR-garbled surname and is omitted.)

agents.note: Freedom's Journal authorised agents roster (standing masthead list, back page)
